title: ChipMOS Q1 revenue jumps 25.4% Y/Y; March sales surge 23.1%
content:
[Revenue Word Concept]
ogichobanov/iStock via Getty Images

ChipMOS Technologies (IMOS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/IMOS]) reported a sharp 25.4% Y/Y increase in Q1 revenue [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20468970-chipmos-reports-23_1-percent-yoy-increase-in-march-2026-revenue-25_4-percent-yoy-increase-in], reaching NT$6,935.6 million or US$216.4 million, due to ongoing demand for high-value memory solutions, particularly in data center and AI applications, benefiting from an AI-related demand/supply imbalance.

In March 2026, revenue reached NT$2,501.6 million or US$78.1 million, a 16.7% increase from February 2026 and 23.1% from March 2025.
